headline.purpose: Marketing section headings in Headline Ink.

body-app.purpose: All editor chrome text and controls.

shadows.name: modal-scrim
shadows.purpose: Backdrop dim behind the theme dialog. The only depth effect in the system; there are no box-shadows.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: All chrome state transitions (background, border, color). Disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Marketing CTA
components.description: The one filled action per marketing page.
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { background: #4338ca; color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; display: inline-block; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; } .ds-btn-cta:hover { background: #0e0f2e; } .ds-btn-cta:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #4338ca; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: App Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action in the editor toolbar (Print or save as PDF).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #6d8dff; border: 1px solid #6d8dff; color: #10131f; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; min-height: 34px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #859fff; border-color: #859fff; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #5c7df2; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6d8dff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: App Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: none; border: 1px solid rgba(109, 141, 255, 0.45); color: #6d8dff; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; min-height: 34px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(109, 141, 255, 0.12); border-color: #6d8dff; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6d8dff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: App Default Button
components.description: Workhorse toolbar button: quiet border, subtle fill on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn { background: none; border: 1px solid #2a2a33; color: #e8e8ee; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; min-height: 34px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07); border-color: #3a3a46; } .ds-btn:active { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6d8dff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: App Ghost Button
components.description: Borderless tertiary or semi-destructive action (Reset to sample).
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: none; border: 1px solid transparent; color: #9a9aa8; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; min-height: 34px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #e8e8ee; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6d8dff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Notice Toast
components.description: Bottom-right status toast. Full 1px border plus surface fill; side-stripe accents are banned.
components.css: .ds-notice { margin: 0; background: #1a1a21; border: 1px solid #2a2a33; color: #e8e8ee; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 14px; max-width: 340px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Toolbar Knob
components.description: Labeled native control group: 12px micro-label plus accent-themed slider.
components.css: .ds-knob-group { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-knob-label { font-size: 12px; color: #9a9aa8; } .ds-knob { width: 110px; margin: 0; accent-color: #6d8dff; cursor: pointer; }

narrative.overview: The moment raw copy becomes a page. Everything in markdown.style is staged around that transformation: plain monospace text on the left, the designed sheet on the right, and the instant where one becomes the other. The interface is the production room, not the publication; it stays dim, exact, and out of the way so the proof itself carries all the light. Two chrome surfaces serve one voice: the editor is a dark workbench, the marketing pages are a bright specimen sheet.
keyCharacteristics: The document is the hero; chrome recedes on both surfaces.
Flat, border-defined construction; zero decorative shadows.
System type everywhere in the chrome; the document themes carry the expressive typography.
One accent per surface, spent on actions and state, never on decoration.
Refined and restrained components: quiet until touched, subtle fills on interaction, no lifts or glows.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Each surface gets exactly one accent, spent on primary actions, current state, and focus. If an element is not interactive or stateful, it does not get accent color.

rules.name: The Dark Text on Accent Rule
rules.body: Proofing Blue fills always carry Ink-on-Accent text. White-on-periwinkle is prohibited; it fails WCAG AA.

rules.name: The Stage Crew Rule
rules.body: No display or decorative fonts in chrome, ever. Expressive typography lives exclusively inside the rendered document themes.

rules.name: The Flat Galley Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest and flat on hover. Interaction feedback is a fill change, never a lift, glow, or shadow.

rules.name: The No Em Dash Rule
rules.body: The em dash (U+2014) is banned in every file, code comments included. Rewrite the punctuation rather than swapping in a hyphen: a comma, a colon, parentheses, or two sentences. src/site/no-em-dash.test.ts enforces it across the repo and refers to the character by escape so it does not flag itself.

dos: Do spend accent color only on actions, selection, and focus (The One Accent Rule).
Do set Ink-on-Accent (#10131f) text on every Proofing Blue fill.
Do keep every interactive element at 4.5:1 contrast or better, with a visible 2px focus outline.
Do use 1px borders and surface steps for depth (The Flat Galley Rule).
Do give every control a visible label; aria-only labeling is a last resort, not a default.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion on every transition, and keep transitions between 150 and 250ms.
donts: Don't look like a plain converter utility: no identity-free white pages with a lone form and button.
Don't look like generic AI-startup SaaS: no gradient heroes, no glassmorphism cards, no purple-on-black, no hero metrics.
Don't look like a corporate enterprise tool: no heavy nav, feature matrices, or stock-photo trust sections.
Don't use side-stripe borders: border-left wider than 1px as a colored accent on toasts, callouts, or cards is prohibited.
Don't use gradient text, box-shadows, or decorative blur anywhere in chrome.
Don't put display fonts or marketing voice inside the editor chrome.
Don't use pure #000 anywhere; the darkest chrome value is Night Slab (#101014).

Don't use an em dash anywhere: not in marketing copy, UI strings, theme descriptions, sample documents, docs, or code comments. Use a comma, a colon, parentheses, or two sentences. A repo test walks every tracked file and fails on one.
